description: Composition Navy blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and branding in graphic print on the left chest and left sleeve Wash care Gentle machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Adopt a winning attitude with this navy blue T-shirt from puma. The stylish graphic print gives this tee a stunning look and the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with jeans and casual shoes. Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
